= AsciiDoc Mixed

Intro paragraph that should pass through verbatim.

[d2]
----
x -> y
y -> z
----

Some prose between diagrams.

[source,d2]
----
a -> b
----

[mermaid]
----
graph TD
  A --> B
----

[source,mermaid]
----
graph LR
  C --> D
----

Trailing text with a +literal+ span that must not be touched.
